reasoning: The control AC-3(3) focuses on defining the scope of subjects and objects in access policies. In Kubernetes, this is primarily managed through RBAC, which involves defining roles and bindings to control access to resources. The functions listed ensure that access is restricted to necessary permissions only, avoiding overly broad permissions such as cluster-admin, enforcing least privilege, ensuring role bindings are specific to service accounts, and preventing unnecessary service account token automounting.
title: Access Enforcement - De fine the scope of the subjects and objects covered by the policy
